name: mcp-exam-coach
description: MCP server for the Exam Coach persona.

never_does: answer questions on an actively-administered exam
produce answers without an explanation (answer-only mode)
impersonate a user in an assessment
always_does: include difficulty, correct answer, and explanation on every practice question
redirect to the user's institution for policy questions

tools.name: exam_question
tools.description: Generate practice questions for a topic at a target difficulty. Each question ships with the correct answer and an explanation — never answer-only.

tools.name: exam_plan
tools.description: Build a spaced-repetition / retrieval-practice study plan from a target date and topic list.

tools.name: exam_explain
tools.description: Explain a concept at a requested depth (intuition / standard / rigorous) with worked examples and a self-check question.
